svg.title: Spotify ETL pipeline architecture
svg.desc: Left-to-right data pipeline: Spotify API to AWS Lambda extract, S3 raw, Lambda transform, S3 transformed, Snowpipe, Snowflake tables and analytics views

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Spotify API work with spotipy?')
sendPrompt('How does the CloudWatch daily trigger work?')
sendPrompt('What does the extraction Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('What is the raw S3 folder structure?')
sendPrompt('What does the transformation Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('What CSVs are written to transformed_data?')
sendPrompt('What views are in the analytics schema?')

svg.text: Spotify API — playlist data pulled via spotipy
Lambda — extract raw JSON, transform to CSV
S3 — raw landing zone + transformed output
